arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS Backup Framework.

control.description: A list of controls associated with the AWS Backup Framework, detailing their parameters and scope.

creation_time.description: The timestamp indicating when the AWS Backup Framework was created.

deployment_status.description: The current deployment status of the AWS Backup Framework.

description.description: A brief description of the AWS Backup Framework.

id.description: The unique identifier of the AWS Backup Framework.

status.description: The current status of the AWS Backup Framework.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the AWS Backup Framework for categorization and management.
